en: In the twenty-seventh year of Jeroboam king of Israel, Azariah the son of Amaziah, king of Judah, began to reign.
zh: 以色列王耶羅波安在位第二十七年，猶大王亞瑪謝的兒子亞撒利雅登基作王。

en: He was sixteen years old when he began to reign, and he reigned fifty-two years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Jecoliah of Jerusalem.
zh: 他登基的時候才十六歲，他在耶路撒冷作王五十二年。他母親名叫耶可利雅，是來自耶路撒冷的。

en: And he did what was right in the eyes of the LORD, according to all that his father Amaziah had done.
zh: 他行耶和華看為正的事，就像他父親亞瑪謝所行的一切。

en: Nevertheless, the high places were not taken away. The people still sacrificed and made offerings on the high places.
zh: 只是邱壇還沒有廢去，人民仍在邱壇獻祭焚香。

en: And the LORD touched the king, so that he was a leper to the day of his death, and he lived in a separate house. And Jotham the king's son was over the household, governing the people of the land.
zh: 耶和華擊打王，他就患了痲風病，直到他死的日子。於是他住在隔離的房子，他的兒子約坦執掌朝務，治理國民。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Azariah, and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?
zh: 亞撒利雅其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

en: And Azariah slept with his fathers, and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David, and Jotham his son reigned in his place.
zh: 亞撒利雅和他的祖先一同長眠，葬在大衛的城，和他的祖先在一起。他的兒子約坦接續他作王。

en: In the thirty-eighth year of Azariah king of Judah, Zechariah the son of Jeroboam reigned over Israel in Samaria six months.
zh: 猶大王亞撒利雅在位第三十八年，耶羅波安的兒子撒迦利雅在撒瑪利亞登基，統治以色列共六個月。

en: And he did what was evil in the sight of the LORD, as his fathers had done. He did not depart from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin.
zh: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，好像他祖先所行的，沒有轉離尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷於罪中的那些罪。

en: Shallum the son of Jabesh conspired against him and struck him down at Ibleam and put him to death and reigned in his place.
zh: 雅比的兒子沙龍陰謀反叛他，在人民面前把他殺死，接續他作王。

en: Now the rest of the deeds of Zechariah, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.
zh: 撒迦利雅其餘的事蹟，看哪，都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上。

en: (This was the promise of the LORD that he gave to Jehu, "Your sons shall sit on the throne of Israel to the fourth generation." And so it came to pass.)
zh: 這就是耶和華曾論到有關耶戶的話說：“你的子孫必坐在以色列的王位上，直到第四代。”這話果然應驗了。

en: Shallum the son of Jabesh began to reign in the thirty-ninth year of Uzziah king of Judah, and he reigned one month in Samaria.
zh: 猶大王烏西雅在位第三十九年，雅比的兒子沙龍登基作王；他在撒瑪利亞作王一個月。

en: Then Menahem the son of Gadi came up from Tirzah and came to Samaria, and he struck down Shallum the son of Jabesh in Samaria and put him to death and reigned in his place.
zh: 迦底的兒子米拿現從得撒上去，到撒瑪利亞攻擊雅比人沙龍，把他殺死，接續他作王。

en: Now the rest of the deeds of Shallum, and the conspiracy that he made, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.
zh: 沙龍其餘的事蹟和他反叛的經過，看哪，都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上。

en: At that time Menahem sacked Tiphsah and all who were in it and its territory from Tirzah on, because they did not open it to him. Therefore he sacked it, and he ripped open all the women in it who were pregnant.
zh: 那時，米拿現從得撒開始，攻打提斐薩和城中所有的人，以及它的四境；因為他們不給他打開城門，所以他攻擊它，把所有的孕婦剖腹。

en: In the thirty-ninth year of Azariah king of Judah, Menahem the son of Gadi began to reign over Israel, and he reigned ten years in Samaria.
zh: 猶大王亞撒利雅在位第三十九年，迦底的兒子米拿現在撒瑪利亞登基，統治以色列共十年。

en: And he did what was evil in the sight of the LORD. He did not depart all his days from all the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin.
zh: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，他在位的日子，沒有轉離尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷於罪中的那些罪。

en: Pul the king of Assyria came against the land, and Menahem gave Pul a thousand talents of silver, that he might help him to confirm his hold on the royal power.
zh: 亞述王普勒來攻打以色列地，米拿現給普勒三萬公斤銀子，請普勒幫助他堅固王位。

en: Menahem exacted the money from Israel, that is, from all the wealthy men, fifty shekels of silver from every man, to give to the king of Assyria. So the king of Assyria turned back and did not stay there in the land.
zh: 米拿現向以色列人，就是所有大財主強索銀子，每人五百七十克，好獻給亞述王。於是亞述王回去了，不在以色列地停留。

en: Now the rest of the deeds of Menahem and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?
zh: 米拿現其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，不是都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上嗎？

en: And Menahem slept with his fathers, and Pekahiah his son reigned in his place.
zh: 米拿現和他的祖先一同長眠，他的兒子比加轄接續他作王。

en: In the fiftieth year of Azariah king of Judah, Pekahiah the son of Menahem began to reign over Israel in Samaria, and he reigned two years.
zh: 猶大王亞撒利雅在位第五十年，米拿現的兒子比加轄在撒瑪利亞登基，統治以色列二年。

en: And he did what was evil in the sight of the LORD. He did not turn away from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin.
zh: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，不轉離尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷於罪中的那些罪。

en: And Pekah the son of Remaliah, his captain, conspired against him with fifty men of the people of Gilead, and struck him down in Samaria, in the citadel of the king's house with Argob and Arieh; he put him to death and reigned in his place.
zh: 比加轄的軍長，利瑪利的兒子比加陰謀背叛他，在撒瑪利亞王宮的衛所擊殺他；與比加同謀的，有亞珥歌伯和亞利耶，以及和他一起的五十個基列人；比加把他殺死，接續他作王。

en: Now the rest of the deeds of Pekahiah and all that he did, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.
zh: 比加轄其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，看哪，都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上。

en: In the fifty-second year of Azariah king of Judah, Pekah the son of Remaliah began to reign over Israel in Samaria, and he reigned twenty years.
zh: 猶大王亞撒利雅在位第五十二年，利瑪利的兒子比加在撒瑪利亞作王統治以色列共二十年。

en: And he did what was evil in the sight of the LORD. He did not depart from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin.
zh: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，不轉離尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷於罪中的那些罪。

en: In the days of Pekah king of Israel, Tiglath-pileser king of Assyria came and captured Ijon, Abel-beth-maacah, Janoah, Kedesh, Hazor, Gilead, and Galilee, all the land of Naphtali, and he carried the people captive to Assyria.
zh: 以色列王比加在位的日子，亞述王提革拉．毘列色前來，攻取了以雲、亞伯．伯．瑪迦、亞挪、基低斯、夏瑣、基列、加利利和拿弗他利全地，把居民擄到亞述去。

en: Then Hoshea the son of Elah made a conspiracy against Pekah the son of Remaliah and struck him down and put him to death and reigned in his place, in the twentieth year of Jotham the son of Uzziah.
zh: 烏西雅的兒子約坦在位第二十年，以拉的兒子何細亞陰謀背叛利瑪利的兒子比加，擊打他，把他殺死，接續他作王。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Pekah and all that he did, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.
zh: 比加其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，看哪，都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上。

en: In the second year of Pekah the son of Remaliah, king of Israel, Jotham the son of Uzziah, king of Judah, began to reign.
zh: 以色列王利瑪利的兒子比加在位第二年，烏西雅的兒子約坦登基作猶大王。

en: He was twenty-five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Jerusha the daughter of Zadok.
zh: 他登基的時候是二十五歲，在耶路撒冷作王十六年。他母親名叫耶路沙，是撒督的女兒。

en: And he did what was right in the eyes of the LORD, according to all that his father Uzziah had done.
zh: 他行耶和華看為正的事，效法他父親烏西雅一切所行的。

en: Nevertheless, the high places were not removed. The people still sacrificed and made offerings on the high places. He built the upper gate of the house of the LORD.
zh: 只是他沒有把邱壇廢去，國民仍在邱壇獻祭焚香。他就是那建造耶和華殿的上門的。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Jotham and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?
zh: 約坦所行其餘的事蹟，不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

en: In those days the LORD began to send Rezin the king of Syria and Pekah the son of Remaliah against Judah.
zh: 在那些日子，耶和華開始派遣亞蘭王利汛和利瑪利的兒子比加去攻擊猶大。

en: Jotham slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father, and Ahaz his son reigned in his place.
zh: 約坦和他的祖先一同長眠，也和他的祖先葬在一起，在他祖宗大衛的城裡。他的兒子亞哈斯接續他作王。
